headline: Coty Revamps Board With Appointment of Five New Independent Directors
summary: NEW YORK, March 18, 2026--Regulatory News: Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) (Paris: COTY) ("Coty" or "the Company") today announced that its Board of Directors (the "Board") has appointed five new independent directors as part of a comprehensive Board refreshment. The new directors are Carsten Fischer, Alia Gogi, Robert Kunze-Concewitz, Maria Carla Liuni, and Stephanie Plaines. Mr. Kunze-Concewitz will serve as Chair of the Board’s Remuneration Committee and Ms. Plaines will serve as Chair of the Board’s

headline: Lululemon just added Chip Bergh, a former Levi's CEO and Swiffer mop creator, to its board
summary: Chip Bergh's 12-year tenure as Levi's CEO is widely regarded as one of the most successful corporate turnarounds in modern retail. He's arguably parachuting into rockier waters at Lululemon than when he joined Levi's.

headline: Body Scrub, Concealer and Shoe Trinkets Star in Brands’ ‘Microdramas’
summary: P&G, Crocs, Maybelline and others are tucking their wares into the plotlines of soapy serials—delivered in brief bursts to be watched on phones.
